title: linum austriacum var. collinum
intro: Linum austriacum var. collinum, also known as Austrian flax, is a plant species belonging to the genus Linum. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Austrian flax can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used topically in creams and ointments to support skin health.
